name: Tokyo
description: Temperate monsoon climate. Warm summers, mild winters, and heavy rainfall cycles.

name: London
description: Temperate maritime climate. Cool summers, mild winters, and frequent cloud cover.

name: New York
description: Humid continental climate. Hot summers, cold winters, and evenly distributed annual precipitation.

name: Mumbai
description: Tropical wet and dry climate. Heavy monsoon downpours from June to September.

name: Sydney
description: Humid subtropical climate. Warm summers, mild winters, and moderate precipitation year-round.

name: Cairo
description: Arid desert climate. Extremely hot summers, warm winters, and minimal rainfall.

name: Manaus
description: Tropical rainforest climate. Consistently hot, highly humid, and heavy daily convective showers.

name: Reykjavik
description: Subpolar oceanic climate. Cool summers, cold winters, heavily buffered by North Atlantic currents.

name: Nairobi
description: Subtropical highland climate. Cool evenings, mild days, and double monsoon wet seasons.

name: Singapore
description: Equatorial rainforest climate. High temperatures, intense humidity, and thunderstorms daily.

name: Las Vegas
description: Hot desert climate. Arid basin, scorching summers, and sparse winter precipitation.

name: Tamanrasset (Sahara)
description: Hyper-arid desert core. Low humidity, massive daily temp swings, and near-zero rainfall.

name: Cape Town
description: Mediterranean climate. Warm dry summers, cool wet winters, influenced by ocean currents.

name: Moscow
description: Humid continental climate. Warm summers, severe snowy winters, and moderate humidity.

name: McMurdo Station
description: Polar ice cap desert. Year-round sub-freezing temperatures, high winds, and low humidity.

name: Vancouver
description: Temperate oceanic climate. Mild wet winters, warm dry summers, buffered by coastal ranges.

name: Paris
description: Temperate oceanic climate. Warm summers, cool winters, and steady annual rainfall.

name: Beijing
description: Continental monsoon climate. Hot humid summers, cold dry winters, and monsoonal rainfall.

name: Rio de Janeiro
description: Tropical wet and dry climate. Hot humid seasons, heavy summer downpours, and oceanic breezes.

name: Dubai
description: Subtropical desert climate. Extremely hot summers, warm humid winters, and low annual rainfall.

name: Nuuk
description: Polar tundra climate. Sub-zero winters, short cold summers, and heavy maritime snowfall.

name: Los Angeles
description: Semi-arid Mediterranean climate. Abundant sunshine, warm dry summers, and mild rainy winters.

name: Anchorage
description: Subarctic climate. Short cool summers, long snowy winters, protected by mountain barriers.

name: Buenos Aires
description: Humid subtropical climate. Warm humid summers, cool damp winters, and heavy summer squalls.

name: Jakarta
description: Tropical monsoon climate. Hot, humid, and heavy monsoon rains from October to April.

name: Bangkok
description: Tropical savanna climate. High humidity, hot summers, and distinct monsoon cycles.

name: Lagos
description: Tropical wet and dry climate. Persistent coastal warmth, high humidity, and double rainy peaks.

name: Lima
description: Mild desert climate. Cool coastal fogs (Garua), near-zero rain, but very high humidity.

name: Santiago
description: Mediterranean climate. Dry hot summers, cool wet winters, bordered by high Andes range.

name: Casablanca
description: Warm Mediterranean climate. Moderate summer temperatures, mild rainy winters.

name: Istanbul
description: Transitional temperate climate. Warm summers, cool snowy winters, and moderate humidity.

name: Stockholm
description: Continental subarctic fringe. Cool summers, cold snowy winters, and low sunset angles.

name: Oslo
description: Temperate continental climate. Long snowy winters, mild summers, buffered by fjords.

name: Helsinki
description: Humid continental climate. Cold maritime winds, snowy winters, and mild humid summers.

name: Toronto
description: Humid continental climate. Warm humid summers, cold snowy winters, moderated by Lake Ontario.

name: Chicago
description: Humid continental climate. Hot summers, cold snowy winters, famous for intense wind vectors.

name: Denver
description: Semi-arid continental climate. High elevation, low humidity, intense sun, and rapid weather shifts.

name: Mexico City
description: Subtropical highland climate. Cool nights, mild days, dry winters, and rainy summers.

name: Bogota
description: Subtropical highland climate. High altitude, uniform cool temperatures, and frequent cloud layers.

name: Lhasa
description: Cool semi-arid climate. High Tibetan plateau, thin air, cold dry winters, and high UV indexes.

name: Kathmandu
description: Humid subtropical climate. Warm summers, cool winters, heavily influenced by Himalayan monsoons.

name: Riyadh
description: Hyper-arid desert climate. Scorching summers, dry winds, and rare winter downpours.

name: Delhi
description: Humid subtropical monsoon climate. Dry hot summers, cool fog winters, and summer monsoons.

name: Seoul
description: Continental monsoon climate. Hot humid summers, cold dry winters, and monsoonal depressions.

name: Manila
description: Tropical monsoon climate. High uniform humidity, hot temperatures, and frequent typhoon cells.
